name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSet

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK == /\ participants \in FiniteSet(N)
          /\ coordinator \in N
          /\ messages \in FiniteSet({[sender \in N, receiver \in N, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, payload \in BOOLEAN]})

Init == /\ participants = {}
        /\ coordinator = 1
        /\ messages = {}

Next == \/ /\ participants' = participants
          /\ coordinator' = coordinator
          /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender \in N, receiver \in N, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, payload \in BOOLEAN] }
        \/ /\ participants' = participants \cup { coordinator }
          /\ coordinator' = coordinator
          /\ messages' = messages
        \/ /\ participants' = participants
          /\ coordinator' = coordinator
          /\ messages' = { m \in messages : m.type \in {"Commit", "Abort"} } \cup { [sender \in N, receiver \in N, type \in {"Commit", "Abort"}, payload \in BOOLEAN] }

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a mapping from fork indices to philosopher indices or NULL *)
Forks == [f \in 1..N |-> IF f \in 1..N THEN NULL ELSE NULL]

(* States: a mapping from philosopher indices to one of "thinking", "hungry", "eating" *)
States == [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper functions *)
LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = Forks
        /\ states = States

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ (* Philosopher p becomes hungry *)
      /\ \E p \in 1..N : states[p] = "thinking"
      /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
      /\ forks' = forks
  \/ (* Philosopher p starts eating if both forks are free *)
      /\ \E p \in 1..N : states[p] = "hungry"
      /\ forks[LeftFork(p)] = NULL
      /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = NULL
      /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
      /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = p, ![RightFork(p)] = p]
  \/ (* Philosopher p stops eating and releases forks *)
      /\ \E p \in 1..N : states[p] = "eating"
      /\ forks[LeftFork(p)] = p
      /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = p
      /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
      /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = NULL, ![RightFork(p)] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] /\ flag[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
    \/ /\ count < K
        /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
    \/ /\ count > 0
        /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State definitions *)
Follower == state = "Follower"
Candidate == state = "Candidate"
Leader == state = "Leader"

(* Type predicates *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ Nat
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

(* Transition actions *)
RequestVote == /\ state = "Follower"
              /\ state' = "Candidate"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor' = None

VoteGranted == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ votedFor' = currentTerm
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
              /\ state' = "Leader"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ RequestVote
      \/ VoteGranted

(* Temporal specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
